notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos singles on a ground ball to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Brett Baty to 3rd. Marcus Semien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luis Robert Jr. walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Luis Robert Jr. homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field. Bo Bichette scores. Jorge Polanco scores.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
